description_long: This hammer features a robust, dual-sided cylindrical head with a metallic red finish and two large, flat striking faces. The head is secured to a sturdy, straight handle that appears to be made of a matte, olive-colored material, possibly reinforced plastic or composite. The handle is detailed with horizontal grip lines for enhanced handling and control. A central metallic fastener is visible, anchoring the head to the handle, and the overall construction suggests durability for heavy-duty urban tasks. The hammer's design is modern, with a focus on both function and visual appeal, making it suitable for use in garages, workshops, or construction sites. No visible branding, wear, or accessories are present, and the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
description: A modern, dual-sided hammer with a metallic red cylindrical head and a straight, olive-colored handle featuring grip lines. The design is robust and clean, suitable for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the dual-sided red metallic head, central fastener, and the straight handle with grip lines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular end of the hammer head and the length of the handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the opposite side of the head and handle alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the circular end of the head and the handle visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight composite handle with matte olive finish and horizontal grip lines for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Dual-sided cylindrical sledge-type head with two large, flat striking faces and a metallic red finish.
